stop_loss.rule: Place stop loss above the retracement high (above the low-high structure)
Stop loss placement below demand zones in buy trades
Stop Loss below Order Block structure
Place stop loss below the low created during liquidity sweep
Stop loss placed below the lowest point of the W3 pattern structure
Place SL below the low of the W/M pattern structure
Place stop loss above the supply zone that defined the Pattern W
Stop loss placement below the pattern structure if zone confidence is insufficient
Stop loss placement not explicitly detailed in transcript - implied below structural low or pattern invalidation point
Place stop loss above the recent high formed during retracement phase
Place stop loss below the Order Block that failed to hold price
Stop loss placement above the supply zone that is being tested
Stop loss placement should be below the structure to protect against reversal
